title: Role-Based Access Control
description: Build an API with role-based access. Users have roles (admin/editor/viewer). POST /api/articles creates articles (editors and admins only). DELETE /api/articles/:id deletes (admins only). GET /api/articles lists all (anyone with auth). Viewers can read but not create or delete.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create a Articles table:
  title, required
  body
  author_id

# Your endpoints here
# Hint: require role 'admin' or 'editor'
